attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT W_DEAL_QUOTE.BK_QUOTE_NUM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.RU_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.QUOTE_NAME, W_DEAL_QUOTE.LDAP_USER_ID, W_DEAL_QUOTE.DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD, W_DEAL_QUOTE.GROSS_MARGIN_PCT, W_DEAL_QUOTE.DEAL_QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DT, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT, W_DEAL_QUOTE.SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_PRDT_DSCNT_PCT, W_DEAL_QUOTE.SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_SVC_DSCNT_PCT, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.SOURCE_CREATED_DTM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID, W_DEAL_QUOTE.PRICE_LIST_NAME, W_DEAL_QUOTE.BK_DEAL_ID, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.LAST_PRICE_DTM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.FROM_CURRENCY_CD, W_DEAL_QUOTE.FEDERAL_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.TRADE_ACT_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.CONVERSION_DT, W_DEAL_QUOTE.ERATE_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT, W_DEAL_QUOTE.ACTIVE_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.TO_CURRENCY_CD, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.PARTNER_BILL_TO_LOCATOR_KEY, W_DEAL_QUOTE.INTENDED_USE_CD,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.BOM_SOURCE_CD, W_DEAL_QUOTE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD, W_DEAL_QUOTE.TRADE_IN_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.IS_QUOTE_TO_ORGER_ELIGiBLE_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.DISTRIBUTOR_ORDERABLE_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.IS_STRINGENT_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.IS_FINALIZED_FLG, W_DEAL_QUOTE.REUSABLE_NON_STNDRD_DSCNT_ROLE, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.CISCO_BOOKINGS_NEUTRALITY_ROLE, W_DEAL_QUOTE.RU_PARENT_QUOTE_NUM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.RU_CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBILITY_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.DV_RNSD_PARENT_ID,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.EDW_CREATE_DTM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, W_DEAL_QUOTE.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.CRP_FLG, 
W_DEAL_QUOTE.GDR_FLG,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.CBN_STATUS_CD,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.LEAD_PTNR_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.SS_CODE,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
W_DEAL_QUOTE.IS_PUBLIC_CLD_MARKETPLACE_FLG 
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_DEAL_QUOTE W_DEAL_QUOTE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE QUOTE 
  	WHERE W_DEAL_QUOTE.BK_QUOTE_NUM=QUOTE.BK_QUOTE_NUM
	AND W_DEAL_QUOTE.SS_CODE = QUOTE.SS_CODE )
